summary: DGII Payment Type Mapping Fix - All 16 backend tests passed. Fixed frontend bug where dgii_payment_code was not being sent to API when saving payment methods.

ui_bugs.issue: dgii_payment_code was not included in the data object sent to API when creating/updating payment methods

critical_code_review_comments: PAYMENT_TYPE_MAP in alanube.py correctly maps 'tarjeta' to 3 and 'transferencia' to 2
PAYMENT_TYPE_MAP in thefactory.py correctly maps 'tarjeta' to '3' and 'transferencia' to '2'
map_payment_type() function in both files correctly prioritizes dgii_code parameter over name-based lookup
billing.py correctly stores and passes dgii_payment_code in payment methods and payments
VentasTab.js has DGII dropdown with options 1-8 in payment method dialog
FIXED: handleSavePayMethod was missing dgii_payment_code in the data object

success_rate.frontend: Bug fixed - dgii_payment_code now included in save

seed_data_creation: None - used existing payment methods in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: DGII Payment Type Mapping feature fully tested. Backend mapping is correct: tarjeta->3, transferencia->2. The map_payment_type() function accepts optional dgii_code parameter that takes priority. Payment methods API correctly stores and returns dgii_payment_code. Fixed frontend bug where dgii_payment_code was not being sent when saving payment methods.
